techStack.rawData: Persist collection metadata, content hashes, and immutable normalized records; do not retain successful response bodies long-term; quarantine failed or parse-anomalous raw responses for 30 days
techStack.dataProcessing: Pandas initially; evaluate Polars only after measured scale bottlenecks
techStack.modeling: scikit-learn: Logistic Regression baseline, HistGradientBoosting candidate, and probability calibration on independent temporal validation windows
techStack.api: FastAPI service with an OpenAPI contract
techStack.frontend: React + TypeScript + Vite; Apache ECharts for analytical charts
techStack.configuration: TOML/JSON with separate data, feature, model, and strategy versions
techStack.scheduling: CLI + Windows Task Scheduler initially; no Airflow/Celery
techStack.desktopPackaging: Local web app first; consider Tauri/Electron only if distribution requires it

sequence: M0-M2: Python CLI, domain/data contracts, time-safety validation, and DuckDB/Parquet data layer
M3-M4: baselines, calibration, value strategy, and walk-forward backtesting
M5: FastAPI/OpenAPI and React analysis workbench
Later: optional desktop packaging after a real need is demonstrated

conventions.architecture: Keep probability model, value strategy, settlement, and presentation as separate modules
conventions.projectIndependence: The project must not depend on any external project's path, code, runtime, or internal schema; external data enters only through project-owned versioned file/API contracts and configurable adapters
conventions.dailyWorkflow: Generate a next-day preplan every evening using only then-available data; refresh at T-30/T-15/T-10/T-5; freeze final SELECT/PASS at T-10 and show T-5 changes without silent overwrite
conventions.modelBoundary: Use separate night-before and race-day models; first-version recommendations cover trifecta ordered only, while settlement contracts support five bet types
conventions.uiDirection: Use visual direction 3 (Analyst Grid): a high-density smart table with grouped venue/race rows, frozen headers, row detail inspection, review states, immutable confirmation, and Excel export
conventions.dependencyPolicy: Do not add dependencies without explicit user approval; pin versions against official compatibility guidance during implementation
conventions.productBoundary: Decision support and paper simulation only by default; no guaranteed-profit claims or automatic wagering

notes.content: Technology route confirmed for long-term project memory on 2026-06-22. This is an implementation recommendation, not evidence that dependencies or modules are already installed.
